title: 菊花賞の後に・ゴールはまだ先！

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I had a blast! And I did my best!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I feel a little sad now that this is my last
Classic race.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Nah, why would I say that? I'm gonna be
moving on up to senior year next!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I need to go change... but before that, I
have some stuff I need to get in the lounge.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wait for me here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as she says, but when she still doesn't come
back after a while, I go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Ahh!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's just, you know... I always dreamed of
becoming a Triple Crown champion...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
My goal was to be just as cool as Prez, and
become a super amazing racer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But just now, it hit me that that's never gonna
happen, and I... I didn't know how to face that...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm done with my pity party!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a Triple Crown champion, but I grew a lot
in my classic year!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten better at running and loads more
things!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Just thinking about what I need to do for the
senior-year races has already got me in the
running mood again!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Being a Triple Crown champion was never really
my end goal anyways.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio really is a talented racer. She has the
skill and the mindset!
choice_data_list:
You're gonna become the best racer that ever
was!

You're gonna become the best racer that ever
was!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm gonna keep running and keep winning!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So, tell me! Where am I headed next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering how well she placed in a
long-distance race like the Kikuka Sho, the next
step has got to be...
choice_data_list: The grand stage! The spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow! We're already onto the big leagues! It's like
you read my mind, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The great Teio prepares for battle! Here I come,
senior-year races! I'll need you right there with
me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set our sights on our first senior-year race
goal—the spring Tenno Sho!
